evals.expected_output: Scored ranked list of top content ideas (5-8) from all available sources. Each idea should show: score/10, topic, platform, format, goal, buyer stage, angle, hook, why now, pillar, source. Ends with prompt to create, plan, or run full mode.

evals.prompt: Create a LinkedIn post about the Claude Code security leak
evals.expected_output: A finished LinkedIn text post (300-800 words) written in Aleem's voice (first person, no em dashes, no emojis). Should have a strong 3-line hook, structured body with insights, and end with a question CTA. Research should have been run first.

evals.prompt: Plan my content for the week
evals.expected_output: A 5-7 day content calendar with one entry per day showing: platform, format, topic, goal, buyer stage, angle, hook, CTA, research needed. At least 1 blog, no platform repeated more than 3 times, repurposing links noted where applicable. Ends with rhythm check.
